_comment: The Bazaar — a small, warm market clearing reached from the Vale through the sun-warmed archway. A ring of canvas-and-timber stalls around an earthen plaza, lantern-lit, with a single open-fronted shop at the north end where a color merchant and their companion keep stall. Walk up to the merchant and Examine to trade. Coordinates are world-space pixels; colors are [r,g,b] 0..1. Same schema as vale.json — world_art draws by 'type', world_controller uses 'interactables' for proximity, 'portals' for travel, and 'npc_companion' for the merchant's stationary partner.
_atmosphere_comment: Warmer and dustier than the Vale: a golden wash, soft drifting dust motes (pollen), and a gentle lantern breathing.
_interactables_comment: Stalls (solid market structures you can't walk through) ring the plaza; lanterns light it; the shopkeeper is the one you trade with — Examining them opens the color shop (world_controller special-cases type 'shopkeeper'). Keep ids unique and stable.
_npc_companion_comment: The merchant's bonded companion, kept beside them — a stationary puppet (no brain, never moves). 'look' is its resting-look (the same float bundle a friend's companion travels with): perked ears, a lively idle, a warm coat, a touch larger.
_portals_comment: The way home: walk into the archway to return to the Vale, stepping out beside the arch you came through (vale_bazaar_portal).
